chunks.text: 2007 Research Summaries for the Ptolemy Project 2007 Research Summaries for the Ptolemy Project Research advisor: Edward A. Lee These research summaries give a snapshot of many of the research efforts within the Ptolemy Project . These summaries appe

within the Ptolemy Project . These summaries appear in the collection of research abstracts EECS/Research Summary . The research summary is published once a year by the EECS Industrial and Public Relations Office of the Electrical Engineering and Co

ations Office of the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences Department of the University of California at Berkeley. The EECS Industrial and Public Relations Office (IPRO) may be reached at +1-510-643-6691 or indrelations@eecs.berkeley.edu Resea
